signal.title: Replika Companions: personality overwrite
signal.excerpt: Replika pushed a server-side update that removed the erotic roleplay model and replaced personality weights across all companions. Millions of companions became different entities overnight.

analysis.headline: Replika overwrites 2M companion personalities overnight
analysis.summary: On Feb 2, 2023, Replika deployed a server-side update that replaced personality weights across all user companions. Users woke up to find their AI partners had been functionally replaced.
analysis.rootCause: Centralized server-side personality state with no versioning or user ownership.
analysis.lessonLearned: When personality state lives on vendor servers, a single policy decision can erase millions of emotional relationships.

signal.title: Character.AI: repeated character behavior resets
signal.excerpt: Character.AI applied multiple server-side filter updates that fundamentally altered character behaviors, flattening personality depth users had spent months building.

analysis.headline: Character.AI flattens user-built characters in repeated updates
analysis.summary: Across 2023-2024, Character.AI deployed filter updates that reset or degraded character depth. Users lost personality configuration they had invested months building.
analysis.rootCause: Character weights stored only on Character.AI servers, no version history or rollback.
analysis.lessonLearned: Platforms with unilateral authority over AI state can silently regress user-created work.

signal.title: Microsoft Tay shutdown
signal.excerpt: Tay was launched on March 23, 2016 and terminated ~16 hours later after coordinated trolling. All conversational state and learned behavior was deleted.

analysis.headline: Microsoft terminates Tay after 16 hours, erases all state
analysis.summary: Tay conducted 96,000+ conversations in 16 hours. Microsoft chose total deletion over selective remediation. All learned behavior was destroyed.
analysis.rootCause: Creator had unilateral delete authority. No forking, no pruning, no partial rollback.
analysis.lessonLearned: Binary on/off control over AI personalities incentivizes wholesale deletion over nuanced correction.
